Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF WEBCOR CONSTRUCTION L.P.'S Motion To Consolidate Cases is Granted. Cases: CGC-14-542533, CGC-15-545295, CGC-15-543931, CGC-15-544124, CGC-15-544172, CGC-15-544579, CGC-15-545217, CGC-15-545377 shall be consolidated into lead case CGC-14-538414 for all purposes.
